overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person vehicle driving through a flooded industrial drainage system during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. The player navigates through concrete channels, passes a burning makeshift camp, drives alongside a massive reservoir, and encounters scattered debris and abandoned vehicles in a dystopian urban wasteland environment.

events.description: vehicle turns right off asphalt street into concrete drainage channel entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet industrial streets and entering a concrete drainage system

entered.detail: industrial building with corrugated metal exterior and blue trim
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns
tall concrete walls lining the drainage channel with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The segment begins driving through a rain-soaked industrial area beneath highway overpasses. The vehicle navigates wet asphalt streets lined with metal-sided warehouses before turning right into a concrete drainage channel entrance. Heavy rain creates reflections on the pavement while the green vehicle HUD remains visible at the bottom of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel with high walls

events.description: vehicle makes sharp right turn to align with drainage channel direction
driving deeper into enclosed channel with walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the narrow concrete channel, adjusting direction to follow the waterway

entered.detail: metal walkway bridge spanning across the drainage channel
green spray-painted graffiti markings on concrete walls
clusters of blue and green garbage bags piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a narrow concrete drainage channel with high walls on both sides. After a sharp right turn, the path continues straight under metal grating bridges. Green graffiti marks the walls while piles of trash bags accumulate in corners. The enclosed space creates an echoing, industrial atmosphere with rain streaming down the concrete surfaces.

events.description: approaching burning vehicle wreck and makeshift camp on right side
passing abandoned vehicles parked along the channel edge

agents.ego_description: driving past a burning camp settlement while maintaining steady speed through the waterlogged channel

entered.detail: destroyed vehicle with active flames and smoke rising
improvised settlement with tarps and debris near the burning wreck
tall electrical transmission towers visible in the distance
derelict vehicles scattered along the channel edge

segments.scene_description: The channel widens slightly to reveal a makeshift settlement with a burning vehicle wreck on the right. Abandoned cars and debris line the concrete edges while high-tension electrical towers loom in the misty distance. The fire provides the only warm light in the cool, rain-soaked industrial wasteland.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeply flooded drainage channel approaching reservoir

events.description: channel opens into massive reservoir area with large concrete dam walls
water depth increases significantly, submerging the concrete channel floor

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly deep water while approaching the large reservoir

entered.detail: massive vertical concrete structure holding back the reservoir water
expansive body of water with choppy surface extending to the horizon
jagged rocks and debris along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The concrete channel gives way to a vast open reservoir area with massive dam walls on the left. The vehicle drives through deep water that completely covers the road surface, creating significant splashes. The scene opens up to reveal a large body of water extending into the hazy distance, with rocky shores and scattered debris marking the transition from urban infrastructure to natural water feature.

events.description: passing parked pickup truck and people sitting on the concrete embankment
vehicle turns left to follow the reservoir edge path

agents.ego_description: cruising along the reservoir edge, passing parked vehicles and observing people near the water

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on the concrete embankment near the water's edge

entered.detail: blue and white vintage pickup truck parked on the concrete slope
sloped concrete surface leading down to the water

segments.scene_description: Driving along the edge of the massive reservoir, the vehicle passes a blue and white pickup truck parked on the concrete embankment. Two people sit near the water's edge, the first human presence seen in the wasteland. The path curves left, keeping the turbulent water to the right while industrial structures and debris line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to enclosed drainage channel with ramp

events.description: vehicle turns back into enclosed channel system and begins ascending ramp
driving up curved concrete ramp, gaining elevation

agents.ego_description: navigating back into the channel system and ascending a curved concrete ramp

entered.detail: upward sloping curved roadway leading to higher elevation
structural steel beams supporting overpass above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle leaves the reservoir behind and re-enters the enclosed drainage channel system. It navigates through debris-strewn concrete corridors before ascending a curved ramp that gains elevation. The environment returns to the claustrophobic industrial aesthetic of the beginning, with metal support beams overhead and rain continuing to pour down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a rain-slicked industrial district into the depths of a concrete drainage system that culminates in a desolate wasteland settlement. It begins by navigating wet asphalt streets beneath highway overpasses and past metal warehouses before turning right into the mouth of a concrete channel. As the vehicle enters this enclosed space, the environment shifts to a narrow corridor of high walls and metal grating bridges, where rain streams down concrete surfaces marked by green graffiti and piles of trash. The scene then opens up as the channel widens, revealing a makeshift settlement characterized by abandoned cars and debris. Finally, the camera passes a burning vehicle wreck that casts a warm glow against the cool, misty backdrop of looming high-tension electrical towers.

The shot follows a continuous journey from a confined concrete channel into a vast, open reservoir before returning to a claustrophobic industrial corridor. It begins as the narrow walls give way to a wide expanse of deep water and massive dam walls, with the vehicle creating heavy splashes as it moves toward a hazy, debris-strewn horizon. As the camera tracks along the reservoir's edge, it passes a parked blue and white pickup truck and two figures resting by the water before the path curves left, leaving the turbulent reservoir behind. The scene then shifts back into the enclosed drainage system, navigating through debris-filled concrete corridors. Finally, the camera ascends a curved ramp under heavy rain and overhead metal beams, returning the environment to its oppressive industrial aesthetic.
